fields.name: AdminCog
fields.value:
**`!adminmenu`** — Open the interactive admin control panel.
  CD: 2x per 10s | Aliases: —
**`!serverstats`** — Display server statistics.
  CD: No cooldown | Aliases: —
**`!cog`** — Load, unload, or reload a cog by name (underscores and _cog suffix optional).

T
  CD: No cooldown | Aliases: —
**`!loadall`** — Load all unloaded cogs, skipping already-loaded ones.
  CD: No cooldown | Aliases: —
**`!unloadall`** — Unload all loaded cogs except this one.
  CD: No cooldown | Aliases: —
**`!coglist`** — Open the interactive cog manager — the panel's 📋 Cog List button.

Mirrors ``_Ad
  CD: 2x per 10s | Aliases: cogs, listcogs, cogslist
**`!syncslash`** — Sync the app-command tree for slash commands (owner only).

PR E' — operator too
  CD: No cooldown | Aliases: syncs
**`!slashes`** — List currently-registered slash commands (admin only).

PR E' — read-only deploy
  CD: No cooldown | Aliases: slashlist
**`!restart`** — Request a graceful restart through the lifecycle service.

LP-3: the cog no long
  CD: No cooldow

fields.name: HelpCog
fields.value:
**`!help`** — Shows available commands. Pass a category name for details.
  CD: 3x per 10s | Aliases: hilfe

fields.name: RoleCog
fields.value:
**`!roles`** — Open the role management hub.
  CD: No cooldown | Aliases: —
**`!rolesettings`** — Open the role management hub (alias for !roles).
  CD: No cooldown | Aliases: —
**`!roleinfo`** — Show a role's details. Usage: !roleinfo <@role|name|id>
  CD: No cooldown | Aliases: ri
**`!rolemenu`** — Open the role hub (use !roles instead).
  CD: No cooldown | Aliases: —
**`!rolecreator`** — Open the role hub (use !roles instead).
  CD: No cooldown | Aliases: —
**`!assignroles`** — Manually run time-based role assignment for all members.
  CD: No cooldown | Aliases: —
**`!createrole`** — Create a role (use !roles → Create instead).
  CD: No cooldown | Aliases: —
**`!deleterole`** — Delete a role by name or mention.
  CD: No cooldown | Aliases: —
**`!setrole`** — Add or update a time-based role threshold.
  CD: No cooldown | Aliases: —
**`!unsetrole`** — Remove a role from time-based assignment.
  CD: No cooldown | Aliases: —
**`!debugroles`** — Print all role names for verification.
  CD: No cooldown | Aliases

fields.name: RoleGrantsCog
fields.value:
**`!temprole`** — Give a member a role for a limited time. Usage: !temprole @member 2h @role
  CD: No cooldown | Aliases: —
**`!temproles`** — List active temporary roles. Usage: !temproles (yours) or !temproles @member (st
  CD: No cooldown | Aliases: —
